strings.go_kitchen_hint: Now go to the kitchen. Click the door.
strings.water_drunk: You filled the cup and drank the water!
strings.coffee_intro: "I need coffee to fully wake up."
strings.need_coffee_drawer: Get coffee from the drawer first!
strings.coffee_hungry: "I am very hungry! I need to eat."
strings.open_fridge_hint: Open the fridge and choose what to make.
strings.collect_ingredients: Collect the right ingredients from the fridge.
strings.apply_paste_hint: Now apply toothpaste to the brush.
strings.brush_click_hint: Now click the brush to brush your teeth.
strings.rinse_hint: Now rinse your mouth at the faucet.
strings.pick_soap_wash_hint: Now pick up the soap and wash your hands!
strings.shampoo_bathtub_hint: Pick up the shampoo, then use the bathtub.
strings.pan_stove_hint: Now put the pan on the stove!
strings.pizza_ready: Pizza in the oven! 🔥 Amazing smell!
strings.omelette_ready: Omelette sizzling on the pan! 🔥 Delicious!
strings.ing_ready_toaster: Find the toaster and use it!
strings.ing_ready_oven: Put the pizza in the oven!
strings.ing_ready_sushi: Roll the sushi on the counter!
strings.pan_from_cabinet: Now get the pan from the cabinet!

ui.recall_question: What does this word mean in English?
